_meta.name: compounding.draft
_meta.label: Compounding Agent — draft
_meta.description: Fee-harvesting-first philosophy: healthy liquidity, organic volume, sane fee APR, low dev/holder risk, volatility-matched strategy. No ATH/momentum chase. Targets repeatable 3-10% wins over occasional moonshots. DRAFT — dry-run and review before applying, do not just npm run apply blind.
_meta.source: Owner's friend's suggestion, 2026-07-07 — cross-checked against lessons.json performance data (34 closed trades: 50% win rate, net -$64 dominated by one -$54 discretionary-hold loss; deterministic rules alone are near-breakeven).
notes: This is the opposite entry philosophy from evil-panda.strict (which chases confirmed ATH breakouts). Do not run both at once.
minEstimatedSharePct re-enabled (was disabled live at 0) — a compounding strategy needs a real fee share, not a rounding error in a huge pool.

stopLossPct tightened to -8% (from live -20% / preset -15%) — the math of 'many small repeatable wins' only compounds if losses stay small too. This is the single most important number in this profile.

athEntryGateEnabled OFF on purpose — we are explicitly NOT gating for momentum chase. solRegimeGateEnabled back ON (currently disabled live) as the market-wide analog of 'don't catch a falling knife'.
autoStrategyMaxPumpPct1h tightened to 10 — this same cap now also gates the P1c spot-dump-gate (symmetric), so it doubles as anti-chase-up AND anti-catch-the-dump in one knob.
GMGN holder-quality caps (bundler/fresh/bundled wallet %) are set to real numbers instead of null/off — these were unused gates in the default config.

NOT included: an upper bound on fee/TVL ratio (reject suspiciously-high short-window fee spikes as likely wash-trading/one-off pump) — no existing gate does this; would need new code in tools/screening.js if wanted.
Position sizing kept small/diversified (0.3 SOL, more slots) rather than reverted to evil-panda's concentrated 2 SOL bets — diversification fits compounding better than conviction sizing.
Try first: `node scripts/apply-preset.js compounding.draft --dry-run` to see the exact diff against current live config before applying anything.
